title: ranunculus pilicaulis
intro: Ranunculus pilicaulis, also known as Mountain Buttercup, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Ranunculus pilicaulis include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
